comment: FR-SPD-002 speed-ramp frame: a 1x -> 2x time-remap curve (keyframes 0->0, 1/2->1/2, 1->3/2) over synthetic media whose green channel encodes the frame index at 128 fps. Sampling t=3/4 inside the 2x segment must decode source frame 128. Ignoring the curve (1x) would decode frame 96 and flattening it to its constant-rate chord (1.5x) would decode frame 144; both differ by >= 32 green levels, far beyond the deltaE tolerance.
